title: Uncovery
description: Uncovery is a datapack that adds content to Minecraft like structures, mobs, items, recipes, advancements, and more.
body:
Uncovery is a datapack that adds content to Minecraft like structures, mobs, items, recipes, advancements, and more. ## 📝 Description Released in July 2023 by bbschef. The datapack is recommended for both singleplayer and multiplayer. It aims to expand the content added in the Trails & Tales update, adding features like paleontology to the game. ## 🌍 Features
Structures #### Paleontology Site A structure that spawns in Plains, Desert, and Tundra biomes. Here you can find the Paleontologist Villager, who offers new trades. Locate with `/locate structure ` #### Ancient Fossils Structures that spawn slightly buried (2 to 4 blocks underground) in Plains, Desert, Tundra, River, Cold Ocean, and Warm Ocean biomes. They can be located using the Fossil Finder item. Locate with `/locate structure ` #### Hydrothermal Vents Natural structures that spawn in Ocean biomes. They are decorative and release both bubbles and smoke. Locate with `/locate structure un:hydrothermal_vent` #### Illusioner Tower A structure that spawns in Swamp biomes. Here you can find the Illusioner, who provides a new exclusive set. Locate with `/locate structure un:illusioner_tower`
Mobs #### Coelacanth A rare fish that spawns in deep cold oceans. It is large and found in groups. Drops Raw Coelacanth upon death. Summonable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/eggs/coelacanth_spawn_egg` #### Paleontologist Villager A mob that spawns in the Paleontology Site. It appears in Plains, Desert, and Tundra biomes. Has unique trades, and each one accepts different fossils. Summonable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/eggs/` #### Illusioner A mob that spawns in the Illusioner Tower. It is a mini-boss that uses its Illusory Bow and arrows to deal damage to players. Summonable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/eggs/illusioner_spawn_egg`
Items This datapack adds new items that cannot be crafted. To learn more, read below.
Fossils #### Podzol Fossils Items found in suspicious gravel in cold Ancient Fossils. There are 6 types of podzol fossils, all tradeable with the Paleontologist Villager. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/fossils/podzol/` #### Sandstone Fossils Items found in suspicious sand in hot Ancient Fossils. There are 6 types of sandstone fossils, all tradeable with the Paleontologist Villager. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/fossils/sandstone/` #### Amber A rare item found in suspicious blocks in Ancient Fossils. Tradeable with the Paleontologist Villager. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/fossils/amber`
Misc #### Raw Coelacanth Obtained by killing a Coelacanth. Can be cooked to obtain cooked cod. Tradeable with the Tundra Paleontologist Villager. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/misc/raw_coelacanth` #### Illusory Arrow Tipped arrows found in the chests of the Illusioner Tower. They apply blindness, slowness, and weakness for 11 seconds on impact. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/misc/illusory_arrow` #### Illusory Bow A bow obtained by killing the Illusioner. It has 50% more durability than the default bow and comes with Power 5 and Punch 2 enchantments. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:uncraftable/misc/illusory_bow`
Recipes This datapack adds new items that can be crafted. To learn more, read below.
Food #### Empanada Craftable food using wheat and any cooked meat. Nutrition: 10, Saturation: 12.8 (high-quality food).
Misc #### Fossil Finder Craftable item using copper, bone, and compass. Allows finding any type of Ancient Fossils through a dialog. Givable with `/loot give @s loot un:craftable/misc/fossil_finder`
## 📌 Notes - It is recommended to use this datapack with CliffTree. - Compatible with any worldgen datapacks like Terralith, WWOO, etc. - Still in development and new content will be added. Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rkzQXctkXj) for updates.
